steps.title: Count the additional days
steps.content: The first day costs $360$ dollars. If the heater is rented for $x$ days total, then there are $x-1$ additional days.

steps.title: Build the cost equation
steps.content:
Add the first-day cost to the cost of the additional days.
$$y=360+180(x-1)$$
$$y=360+180x-180=180x+180$$
The answer is A.
